mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM posts WHERE board_id = #{boardId}

SELECT p.post_id AS postId, p.board_id AS boardId, p.title, u.name AS authorName, p.created_at AS createdAt FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.user_id = p.author_id WHERE p.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY p.post_id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT p.post_id, p.board_id, p.title, p.content, p.author_id, u.name AS author_name, p.created_at, p.updated_at FROM posts p JOIN users u ON u.user_id = p.author_id WHERE p.post_id = #{postId} LIMIT 1
SELECT f.file_id AS fileId, f.original_name AS originalName FROM post_files pf JOIN files f ON f.file_id = pf.file_id WHERE pf.post_id = #{postId} ORDER BY f.file_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO posts(board_id, title, content, author_id) VALUES(#{boardId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{authorId})
mapper.update: UPDATE posts SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE post_id = #{postId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post_files(post_id, file_id) VALUES(#{postId}, #{fileId}) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING
